Global Citiznes in Hong Kong Allow Trial in Mainland China


We are Hong kong-er ,this maybe the last voices of us.
today HK GOV want to
Changes to the Fugitive Offenders Ordinance
Authoritarian Judiciary Threatens,
Global Citiznes in Hong Kong Allow Trial in Mainland China

If someone you love , transfer flights at Hong Kong. But they arrested buy something they never did. The only reason is China GOV want to lock him in concentration camp. Will you accept that?
We won’t , but we have no power to stop it.

If this law legislated. We recommend US to do the following things:
US united with UK and NATO army take over Hong Kong for protect their national
Raising China tariffs to 100% .
Freezing the assets of peoples (and their family)for whom responsible or support this law and denying them entry to the US.
This is how to stop China to harm the US

坐車屎忽痕改咗份嘢


We are Hong kong-er, shivering from the fear of the China Communist Party making our possibly last utterance.
The HK Goverment is going to amend the exradition law, permitting extradition to China upon request from China's legal authority. In light of the cases like Mr. Gui Minhai, a Swedish who was arreeted by Chinese agent, because of composing books about China's politics, we all know that the human rights, and the right of being judged adn treated fairly is not possible in China. In recent conflicts between Canada and China about Meng Wanzhou, China arrested two Canadian for revenge. It gives us insight into how China will deal with diplomatic conflicts. Thus, NOT ONLY the China dissidents, BUT US citizens are threatened by the amendment in extradition law, especially US is in a trade war with China.

It does not merely affect the dwellers in Hong Kong. If a US citizens transfer flights at Hong Kong, they might be arrested for something they never did. The only sin, is being a foreigner whose country is in conflict with China.

We hope the White House would do something to protect the US citizens in Hong Kong, and the corporations as well. The amendment would only decay Hong Kong from being a shelter for US citizens and corporations, and in turn weaken their ability to do safe business in China, or even threaten the safety of them.

We would like recommend US to do the following things, if the amendment has passed regardless of the fact that it is opposed internationally :

US united with UK and NATO army take over Hong Kong for protect their national
Raising China tariffs to 100% .
Freezing the assets of peoples (and their family)for whom responsible or support this law and denying them entry to the US.

These are the measures that could protect US citizens in Hong Kong.
